task: place the gray bowl in the dish rack
raw:
**SCENE ANALYSIS -** A gray bowl is on a blue dish rack. A yellow cup is on a silver tray to the left. An orange is on the wooden table. The gray bowl is the target object. It is a rigid container with a rim. The dish rack is a flat surface. STRATEGY - Reach the bowl, grasp it by its rim for stability, transport it to the dish rack, and place it gently on the rack. Failure modes include dropping the bowl or placing it incorrectly. AFFORDANCE REASONING - Step 1 reach the bowl at its rim; Step 2 grasp the rim for secure hold; Step 3 transport to the dish rack; Step 4 place on the rack.

Goal: on(gray_bowl, dish_rack); stable(gray_bowl)
Scene: gray_bowl, dish_rack, yellow_cup, silver_tray, orange, table
Step 1: reach(gray_bowl)
  affordance_region: the rim of the gray bowl
  contact: gripper_state(open) [progress]
  spatial: distance(gripper, gray_bowl, <, 0.03) [completion]
  direction: approach_axis(0, 0, -1) [progress]
  done_when: distance(gripper, gray_bowl) < 0.03
Step 2: grasp(gray_bowl)
  affordance_region: the rim of the gray bowl
  contact: holding(gray_bowl) [completion]
  direction: grasp_axis(0, 0, -1) [progress]
  done_when: holding(gray_bowl)
Step 3: transport(gray_bowl -> dish_rack)
  affordance_region: an empty area on the dish rack
  spatial: above(gray_bowl, dish_rack, 0.05) [completion]
  safety: no_drop(gray_bowl)
  done_when: above(gray_bowl, dish_rack, 0.05)
Step 4: place(gray_bowl -> dish_rack)
  affordance_region: an empty area on the dish rack
  contact: surface_contact(gray_bowl, dish_rack) [completion]; released(gray_bowl) [completion]
  pose: stable(gray_bowl) [completion]
  done_when: surface_contact(gray_bowl, dish_rack) AND released(gray_bowl)
<END_OF_PLAN>

steps.affordance_region: the rim of the gray bowl
the rim of the gray bowl
an empty area on the dish rack
an empty area on the dish rack
